nasb.text: I have no wrath. Should someone give Me briars and thorns in battle, Then I would step on them, I would burn them completely.

esv.text: I have no wrath. Would that I had thorns and briers to battle! I would march against them, I would burn them up together.

cnv.text: 我再沒有忿怒， 若荊棘和蒺藜與我交戰， 我就上前踐踏它們，把它們全部焚毀。

ccb.text: 我不再向它发怒。 若是发现荆棘和蒺藜， 我就对付它们， 把它们烧光。

csbs.text: 我里面没有怒火， 但谁要是给我荆棘蒺藜， 我就大步前去与他们交战， 把他们彻底烧掉；
